intro_cards.title: Wistful Sentence Ender: なあ
intro_cards.body:
なあ is a sentence-final particle expressing feeling — wistfulness, longing, or admiration.

• いい天気だなあ。(What nice weather...)
• 日本に行きたいなあ。(I really want to go to Japan...)
• 懐かしいなあ。(How nostalgic...)

なあ vs ね:
• ね seeks agreement from the listener
• なあ is more internal — expressing feeling to yourself (or out loud)

In manga, なあ often ends a thought bubble — contemplative and genuine.
More common in male speech, but used by all speakers.
